nasb.text: Then Saul and all the people who were with him rallied and came to the battle; and behold, every man’s sword was against his fellow, and there was very great confusion.

esv.text: Then Saul and all the people who were with him rallied and went into the battle. And behold, every Philistine’s sword was against his fellow, and there was very great confusion.

cnv.text: 掃羅和所有跟隨他的人就聚集起來，到了戰場，就看見非利士人用刀互相擊殺，十分混亂。

ccb.text: 他和跟随他的人聚集起来，冲入战场，发现非利士人正互相残杀，乱作一团。
